name: SFMC Dashboard
description: Salesforce Marketing Cloud metrics dashboard — view Contacts, Data Extensions, and Automations at a glance.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src https://*.marketingcloudapis.com https://*.rest.marketingcloudapis.com https://*.auth.marketingcloudapis.com https://api.anthropic.com https://*.salesforce.com https://*.force.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com data:;
